Container.Name: grampsweb
Container.Overview: Gramps Web is a modern, feature-packed, free & open source web app for browsing and collaboratively editing genealogical databases. It is the web-based companion to the Gramps desktop application and is fully interoperable with it.[br][br][b]Features:[/b][br]- Interactive family tree charts (ancestor, descendant, fan, hourglass)[br]- Dynamic mapping tools with historical map overlays[br]- Collaborative multi-user editing with role-based access[br]- Advanced privacy controls per person/record[br]- GEDCOM import/export[br]- Media support (photos, documents)[br]- DNA & chromosome tools[br]- AI chat assistant (query your family tree in natural language)[br]- Blog for documenting research stories[br]- 40+ languages[br]- Bi-directional sync with Gramps Desktop[br][br][b]IMPORTANT - Multi-Container Setup:[/b][br]Gramps Web requires Redis (for Celery task queue) and a Celery worker. This template configures the main web application container. You must also deploy the Redis and Celery containers. The easiest way is to use the provided docker-compose.yml via your Unraid terminal or Portainer:[br][br][code]mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/grampsweb[br]cd /mnt/user/appdata/grampsweb[br]docker compose up -d[/code][br][br]Or deploy each container individually using this template (see Support thread for step-by-step guide). After the first run, access the setup wizard at the WebUI to create your admin account and import your family tree (.gramps format).

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Port for the Gramps Web UI (mapped to container port 5000)

Config.Name: Tree Name
Config.Description: Name of the family tree (created on first run if it doesn't exist)

Config.Name: Redis Broker URL
Config.Description: Celery broker URL. Use 'redis://172.17.0.1:6379/0' if Redis runs on the host network, or set to a custom Redis container name

Config.Name: Redis Result Backend
Config.Description: Celery result backend URL. Should match the broker URL

Config.Name: Rate Limit Storage
Config.Description: Redis URL for rate limiting storage

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Set if behind a reverse proxy with a custom URL (e.g., https://genealogy.example.com)

Config.Name: CORS Origins
Config.Description: Additional CORS origins if needed (comma separated)
